subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the one omnipotent Lord, Who through the Most Great Name hath illumined the world and its peoples with the light of His true Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد قادر یکتا را که باسم اعظم عالم و امم را بنور نیر توحید حقیقی منور نمود و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
